'''Prex''' was the title for the personal [[Politics|representative]] of the [[Executive Directorship Board]] of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. These individuals were selected by their peers and would serve for three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] on the Direx Board. This made it serve as a counterbalance to the position of [[ExO]]. The Prex was also responsible for the secret annual reports to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], which they did personally.

[[Chils Meplin]] was a Prex.
